svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="User Registration" id="Md07MzhQ_YLtNMia1D9n"> <mxGraphModel dx="1323" dy="715" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="200" pageHeight="413" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-237" parent="1" style="shape=rect;html=1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;whiteSpace=wrap;align=center;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;" value="Driver Safety Analytics System" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="360" width="760" x="170" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-238" parent="1" style="shape=umlActor;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;html=1;outlineConnect=0;" value="Fleet Manager" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="30" x="60" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-239" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="View Driver
Safety Profile" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="210" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-240" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="View Score
History Timeline" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="210" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-241" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Retrieve Safety Data
from Database" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="470" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-242" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Display Score &amp;
Event Breakdown" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="470" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-243" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Highlight Low-Scoring
Drivers (Warning)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="470" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-244" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Handle Insufficient
Data (Alternate)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="730" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-245" edge="1" parent="1" source="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-238"
